narrative:
Montgomery County has 358,335 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 27.0% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +1.7% D−R vs -2.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
